---
title: "Publications"
---

# Publications

## Journal Article

### 1. Multi Meta Information Fusion Graph Neural Networks for Session-based Recommendation

**Authors:** Yan Wen, Hui-Zheng Sun, Liang Liu, Ya-Kun Zhou, Wei Bian, Ming-Hai Yan\
**Journal:** *Journal of Network Intelligence*\
**Volume and Issue:** 10(1)\
**Pages:** 366–382\
**Date:** February 2025

[Read the paper](https://bit.kuas.edu.tw/~jni/2025/vol10/s1/25.JNI-S-2024-03-015.pdf)

This publication focuses on session-based recommendation systems and proposes a graph neural network framework that combines normal graph and hypergraph structures. The model is designed to better represent short-term user behavior and group intention within anonymous sessions, while also incorporating cross-session information to improve recommendation accuracy.
